title: FFL lock indicator
description: (DEPRECATED) Shows an indicator next to your hotbar when you lock your elytra using FallFlyingLib
body:
## DEPRECATED as of 1.18

# FFL lock indicator

A mod that shows an icon next to your hotbar when you lock your elytra when it's locked within [FallFlyingLib](https://github.com/CafeteriaGuild/FallFlyingLib)
